# BoothLedger

> Professional photo booth software for events. Canon DSLR support, custom templates, instant SMS/email sharing, cloud management & AI effects.

BoothLedger is a Windows photo booth application designed for professional event photographers and photo booth operators. It supports Canon DSLR cameras, custom multi-photo templates, direct dye-sublimation printing, and instant sharing via SMS, email, and QR codes. The software includes two AI engines for creative effects like face swap, AI backgrounds, magazine covers, and artistic transformations.

## Pages

- [Home](https://boothledger.com/): Main landing page with features overview, download, and FAQ
- [AI Photo Booth](https://boothledger.com/ai-photo-booth): AI-powered photo booth features including face swap, AI backgrounds, and 50+ creative effects
- [Pricing](https://boothledger.com/pricing.html): Subscription plans starting at EUR 20/month with 30-day free trial

## Key Features

- Canon DSLR camera integration with live view
- AI face swap and AI background removal
- Custom multi-photo templates
- Direct dye-sublimation printing
- SMS, email, and QR code sharing
- Boomerang and GIF capture
- Cloud sync via BoothLedger Cloud
- Offline mode with automatic sync
